conversations_memory:
**Work context**

Mahi is currently completing a Technicien Supérieur in Stock Management and Logistics, with an active warehouse internship at Direction de l'Education El Bayadh (Service de Programmation et de Suivi) running through March 2026. Mahi also has a background as a former admin/training assistant at Allal School (Nov 2024–May 2025) and is an Amazon KDP self-publisher (Arabic children's books, account suspended June 2022 with appeal ongoing).

**Personal context**

Mahi Kamel Abdelghani (DOB: March 6, 1996) lives in El Bayadh, Algeria, and holds a Bachelor's in English Linguistics with a focus on Phonetics and Grammar. Interests include IT (PC maintenance, networking, OS testing), supply chain/logistics, astrology/numerology, Islamic eschatology, and planetary transits. Mahi manages digital archives and Google Takeout data, and uses Adobe InDesign and Affinity Publisher for KDP work.

**Top of mind**

Mahi is in the final push of a thesis (Memoire_Final_Complet.docx) due for defense in April 2026, with Ch1 and front matter complete and Ch2–Ch4 pending. The Mini ERP solution (v4 .xlsm and v5 .xlsx) is a central deliverable, with real stock card data from 16 photos now digitized into Fiches_Stock_Reelles_Terrain_2026.xlsx (14 articles, including 3 unknowns), superseding earlier AI-simulated data. Key active tasks include finalizing Ch2 and Ch3 Arabic draft text (sourced from Gemini export, March 27, 2026), ensuring ART-001 Rame A4 uses the correct unit price of 400 DZD throughout all CMUP calculations, and preparing the CD submission package with the confirmed folder structure (01–04).

**Brief history**

*Recent months*

Mahi has been building and iterating the Mini ERP application across multiple versions: v4 (.xlsm, 10 sheets including ACCUEIL, ARTICLES, FOURNISSEURS, MOUVEMENTS, DASHBOARD, CALCULS_EOQ, INVENTAIRE, HISTORIQUE, GUIDE, VBA_CODE) and v5 (.xlsx, 3 sheets, running CMUP OPT-2, dynamic ROP OPT-1, Wilson EOQ OPT-3, using XLOOKUP). A blank input helper (March_2026_Movement_Entry.xlsx) and a polished RTL Arabic HTML interface mockup are also part of the deliverables. The internship site is confirmed as a Magasin de Consommation Interne distributing only to internal departments (not external schools). Real stock cards were photographed and reveal critical ruptures: Toner G030 (stock = 0 for 40+ days), Rame A3 (hit 2 units), Sous-chemise (hit 1 unit); all "N° du Bon" columns are empty across all cards, confirming zero traceability — a key diagnostic finding for Ch3. The thesis supervisor (Encadreur) is دهيني ميمونة (Maqtasida), and the institute contact is حقانة at مصلحة الدراسات في الوسط المهني. Defense requires 4 فرضة أسبوع في أفريل before the date is announced.

Active working rules: Excel files retain French/bilingual tab names and column headers (Arabic translation deferred); bibliography/references pages are placed alongside each chapter, not end-of-document, and in-text citation markers inside tables are not used — both deferred for later implementation.

*Long-term background*

Mahi has a long-standing interest in IT and self-publishing, with KDP work in Arabic children's books predating the account suspension in 2022. The English Linguistics background (Phonetics and Grammar focus) informs a precise, structured communication style. Mahi prefers direct, technical, and organized interactions with practical, structured outputs.

**Other instructions**

- Communication style: direct, technical, organized; prefers structured information and practical solutions.
- Skill inventory (as of March 2026): Critical — algerian-thesis, main-brain, docx, pdf, xlsx; High — doc-coauthoring, pptx; Medium — frontend-design, web-artifacts-builder, file-reading; Low — canvas-design. External tools (Tavily/Context7/TaskMaster) not available in Claude.ai.
- The four uploaded "بطاقات_المخزون_مديرية_التربية.xlsx" files are confirmed AI-generated simulations (Gemini), NOT real field data — do not treat them as ground truth; real data is in Fiches_Stock_Reelles_Terrain_2026.xlsx.
- ART-001 (Rame A4) unit price is definitively 400 DZD (not 180 DZD); use this in all CMUP calculations.

project_memories.019cf643-47d2-7124-b2c6-97e1005f3b12:
**Purpose & context**

Mahi Kamel Abdelghani is based in El Bayadh, Algeria. His work spans several interconnected domains:

- **Logistics & Stock Management**: Currently completing a Higher Technician certification while interning at a warehouse
- **Amazon KDP / Self-Publishing**: Active self-publisher specializing in educational and logbook-style content; uses Adobe InDesign and Affinity Publisher; has an account appeal in progress
- **IT & Technology**: Background as an IT instructor with certifications in PC maintenance and networking
- **Academic background**: Bachelor's degree in English with a focus on Phonetics and Grammar — an underleveraged asset relative to his current work
- **Personal interests**: Astrology, numerology, Islamic eschatology, testing operating systems, and managing digital archives

Mahi prefers direct, technical, and organized communication with structured information and practical solutions. He dislikes unnecessary back-and-forth and often uses compact shorthand to signal that Claude should execute directly.

---

**Current state**

- **KDP product in progress**: A notary public record journal (5.5"×8.5", 100 entries, English-only) built with a Python/ReportLab generator. Design is approved in its clean, modern, minimal grayscale style — no filled color blocks, section headers use a 2pt left accent line, thumbprint/seal boxes use L-shaped corner brackets. Working file: `/home/claude/generate_journal_v2.py`. Layout refinement is ongoing.
- **Google Drive / local file organization**: A large Google Drive Takeout dataset (~30 GB) on the D: drive is being cleaned and reorganized using PowerShell scripts. A six-phase pipeline script (`Organize-DriveArchive.ps1`) was built to purge irrelevant folders, deduplicate by MD5 hash, categorize into a minimal `D:\ARCHIVE\` structure, and generate an HTML report. A separate Downloads-folder deduplication script (`Find-Duplicates-Downloads.ps1`) was also created as a first step.
- **Logistics Knowledge System (PKS)**: A well-structured folder tree exists in Google Drive (inside TAG 1801 GSL) but was confirmed empty at last check — source files are likely stored locally or in non-indexed formats. A 24-task migration checklist was created to guide the upload and organization process.
- **Skill-building system**: Mahi uses a skill-creator framework to package reusable Claude skills. Skills built so far include `github-workflow` and `notary-journal-skill`.

---

**On the horizon**

- Completing the notary journal PDF and preparing it for KDP submission
- Populating the Logistics Knowledge System folders with course files, thesis materials, ERP/Excel files, and chat exports
- Resolving the KDP account appeal
- Addressing identified knowledge gaps, particularly: Amazon Ads/KDP PPC, SQL/enterprise ERP, and foundational accounting

---

**Key learnings & principles**

- **Knowledge gap awareness**: A structured audit identified 24 gaps across six domains. High-priority gaps include Amazon Ads/KDP PPC, SQL/ERP exposure, and accounting fundamentals. English linguistics background is underleveraged.
- **Drive search behavior**: The `'[folderID]' in parents` query syntax is required for reliable folder content listing via API. Semantic-only queries return empty results. Non-Google-native files (PDFs, .docx) that haven't been opened in Drive are not surfaced by search even if physically present.
- **Skill-creator packaging**: Must be invoked as `cd /mnt/skills/examples/skill-creator && python3 -m scripts.package_skill [input_dir] [output_dir]` — running from a different directory fails.
- **PDF layout analysis**: `pdfplumber` with `page.extract_words()` gives precise x/y coordinates, more useful than `extract_text()` for understanding column positions and section spacing.
- **ReportLab**: Built-in Helvetica handles English-only output without external fonts; install with `pip install reportlab --break-system-packages`.
- **PowerShell scripts**: Dry-run mode by default with an explicit `-Execute` or `-DeleteDuplicates` flag for destructive actions — a pattern Mahi has adopted consistently.

---

**Approach & patterns**

- Prefers minimal, clean aesthetics in design work — no decorative fills, strict grayscale palettes, corner-bracket styling over closed rectangles
- Organizes knowledge and files into structured, hierarchical systems (PKS folder trees, ARCHIVE categories) with an emphasis on simplicity and minimalism
- Uses Claude skills as reusable, packaged modules — comfortable with the skill-creator workflow and uses compact shorthand to trigger direct execution
- Tends to work across multiple tools and platforms simultaneously (Drive, local PC, KDP, Python scripts) and values automation that bridges them
- Transfers context deliberately between AI platforms to maintain continuity

---

**Tools & resources**

- **Design**: Adobe InDesign, Affinity Publisher, ReportLab (Python), pdfplumber
- **Scripting & automation**: PowerShell (Windows), Python
- **Publishing**: Amazon KDP
- **Storage**: Google Drive (with Takeout archive locally on D: drive)
- **Key Drive folder IDs**:
  - Root Drive: `0AJiWvAD7zJo9Uk9PVA`
  - TAG 1801 GSL: `1x2ui_xcBvYD-WfWgT51MxY6ikDHu73cR`
  - Logistics_Knowledge_System: `1yOM2Gk5h6Z_ajvMUPZEx2f44Hu4Yqbep`
  - S1–S4 lessons, Drafts_AR, ERP_Excel subfolders documented in prior sessions
project_memories.019d1421-cfa6-7526-b0a1-dabb692f9d76:
**Purpose & context**

Mahi is a Technicien Supérieur student in Stock Management and Logistics (GSL, cohort TAG1801) at CNEPD/INSFP El Bayadh, Algeria, completing a graduation project with a defense date of April 2026. The project has two parallel deliverables:

1. **ERP_Academie** — a custom Excel-based Mini ERP for the internal consumption warehouse (Magasin de Consommation Interne) at مديرية التربية لولاية البيض
2. **Arabic-language academic thesis (مذكرة)** — documenting the field diagnosis and ERP solution, following Algerian TS/CFPA formatting standards

**Thesis supervisor:** دهيني ميمونة (budget/economics department at the directorate). **Institute contact for submission:** حقانة. **Internship site:** warehouse of Direction de l'Éducation, Wilaya El Bayadh. The warehouse serves internal departments only (not external schools) and operates on Windows 7 + Excel 2010 — a hard compatibility constraint for all ERP work.

**Cross-AI workflow:** Gemini handles heavy drafting; Claude handles formatting, auditing, document production, and persistent context. Outputs from other AI sessions are fed into Claude as exports for processing.

---

**Current state**

**ERP — Active version: v8.1** (`ERP_Academie_v8_1.xlsx`)
- 14 sheets, 621 formulas, zero errors
- Key additions vs. v8: ARTICLES gains columns 11–13 (Catégorie, Sous-catégorie, Alias with naming conflict fixes); BON_SORTIE sheet (A4 exit receipt template modeled on 2023 وصل خروج archive); VBA fully rewritten with RTL UserForm, cascading cmbCategorie→cmbArticle dropdowns, real-time lblStockActuel display, mandatory N° Bon validation, and GenererBonSortie() macro

**Pending ERP items (from Gemini discussion):**
1. Arabic front-end UI with simple layout
2. One-click PDF automation
3. Directory/file save architecture
4. Item naming conflict fix via Master Data (unique IDs, cascading dropdowns, no free-text)
5. Hierarchical categories (main + sub) in ARTICLES — now addressed in v8.1
6. BON_SORTIE template — now addressed in v8.1

**Thesis chapter status:**
- Ch1 ✅ Complete
- Ch2 ✅ Generated (docx delivered)
- Ch3 ⏳ Pending — diagnostic + quantitative tables (field evidence, ABC analysis, Wilson EOQ)
- Ch4 ⏳ Pending — ERP solution documentation

---

**On the horizon**

- Complete and deliver Ch3 (التشخيص الميداني): 3 مباحث, 7 مطالب, 7 tables including ABC Pareto, CMUP movement table, Wilson parameters/results
- Complete Ch4 (ERP solution, before/after KPIs, hypothesis validation, recommendations)
- Arabic front-end UI and one-click PDF automation for ERP
- Defense preparation (April 2026)
- CD submission package: colored PDF, grayscale PDF, .docx, .doc legacy, .xlsm, .xls legacy, HTML interface, Annexes

---

**Key learnings & principles**

**Confirmed field values (canonical — use these, not older versions):**
- ART-001 (Rame A4): PU = **400 DZD** (not 180 — corrects all prior v4/v5 errors)
- EOQ = **60 rames**, ROP = **216 rames**, CVT = 4,817 DZD/year
- Wilson parameters: D = 2,900 units/year, CL = 50 DZD, t = 20%, Cs = 80 DZD, SS = 200 units, LT = 2 days
- Observation period: 38 days; annual working days: 250
- ABC analysis: م-001 alone = ~72.2% of total annual stock value (1,607,720 DZD) — classified Class C, a diagnostic anomaly
- N° Bon column: **empty on 100% of movement records** — core traceability gap finding for Ch3
- 12 confirmed articles (م-001 through م-012) + 3 unidentified (INC-01/02/03)
- Key rupture events: Toner G030 at zero stock for 40+ days; Rame A3 dropped to 2 units; Sous-chemise dropped to 1 unit

**ERP v5 known bugs (for reference/audit continuity):**
- Bug 1: XLOOKUP in 26+ cells — incompatible with Excel 2010; replace with `=IFERROR(VLOOKUP(ref, ARTICLES!$A$3:$I$17, col_index, 0), "")`
- Bug 2: CMUP cols J/K/L use row-comparison logic (B_row <> B_prev) — breaks on chronological mixed-article entry; fix with SUMPRODUCT expanding-range formula
- Bug 3: Prix Unitaire col F manually hardcoded — fix: `=IFERROR(VLOOKUP(B3,ARTICLES!$A$3:$G$10,7,0),0)`
- Extra: ranges capped at row 16 (extend to row 500)
- Wilson EOQ via SUMPRODUCT is Excel 2010 compatible ✅

**VBA patterns:**
- Worksheet_Change event handler: place in MOUVEMENTS sheet module with EnableEvents guards; one-time paste, runs permanently
- Empty N° Bon guard: auto-generate fallback reference in format YYYYMMDD-ArticleCode
- MOUVEMENTS formulas within the sheet must NOT use "MOUVEMENTS!" qualifier (causes circular reference)
- Stock balance: `=SUMIFS(qty,"IN") - SUMIFS(qty,"OUT")` — reliable and Excel 2010 compatible
- openpyxl cannot inject VBA binary — workaround: VBA_CODE sheet with paste instructions for ALT+F11

**Thesis formatting rules (Algerian TS standard):**
- Font: Traditional Arabic 14pt (Arabic sections), Times New Roman 12pt (French)
- Margins: 3cm binding, 2.5cm others; 1.5× line spacing
- Table captions: chapter-prefixed, placed above tables
- Bibliography: page per chapter (not in-text citation markers)
- Excel tab names and column headers: remain French/bilingual for now (Arabic translation deferred)

---

**Approach & patterns**

- Mahi confirms continuation with "استمر" or "نعم"; reviews outputs iteratively and requests specific corrections
- Prefers comprehensive, structured outputs with explicit next steps after every response
- Uses Claude for auditing, formatting, and document production; Gemini for heavy drafting
- Feeds Gemini/ChatGPT exports into Claude for processing via the main-brain skill workflow
- Works in Arabic MSA for thesis content; French/bilingual for ERP technical elements

---

**Tools & resources**

**Project workspace:** `C:\Users\Administrator\Dropbox\Logistics and Thesis Hub\`
- Root: `CLAUDE.md` + `.claude/` folder
- `.claude/commands/backup-erp.md` (slash command)
- `.claude/skills/thesis-outliner/SKILL.md`
- Note: kdp-formatter skill belongs to the separate **Notary Journal project** — not this project

**Technical stack:**
- Excel 2010 on Windows 7 (hard constraint — no XLOOKUP, no dynamic arrays)
- Python/openpyxl for ERP file generation and auditing
- Node.js docx npm package (CommonJS mode) for Arabic RTL thesis documents
- Claude Desktop with MCP servers: filesystem MCP (Dropbox), super-shell-mcp, PowerShell.MCP v1.7.4
- Dropbox for file storage and sync
- HTML interface (trilingual: AR/FR/EN) for ERP desktop simulation
- GitHub repository for AI Text Humanizer (Python/Streamlit) — separate workstream

**Skills in use:** main-brain (PKS), thesis-outliner, algerian-thesis formatter, prompt-master
